text:
Created attachment 247202
VLC-VDPAU-AMD.log

Hello,

some users have reported that VLC segfaults when they are using VDPAU as output.

As far as i can tell it doesn't work for AMD as well but it continues to play (in my case).

An debug log have been attached.

Thank you in advance!
